ec90e4824889.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
ec90e4824889.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
ec90e4824889.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

ae22e6d1e418.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
ae22e6d1e418.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
ae22e6d1e418.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

5dd9e68e088a.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
5dd9e68e088a.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

ee7440d72bbe.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
ee7440d72bbe.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
ee7440d72bbe.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

c1b296199737.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
c1b296199737.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
c1b296199737.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible

ce38baf018ec.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
ce38baf018ec.description: At 73 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
